title: Energy Prices
description: A Shiny app that displays historical energy price data, sourced from the U.S. Energy Information Association.

title: Parcel Pulse
description: A commercial real estate intelligence tool. Enter any US address to analyze demographics, competitive landscape, consumer spending potential, and, for North Carolina addresses, nearby parcels, including ownership, size, and valuation. Best viewed on desktop.
technologies: APIs: ESRI ArcGIS REST API (TIGERweb, NC OneMap Parcels), U.S. Census Bureau APIs, Overpass API (OpenStreetMap)

title: Site Tracker
description: A demo pipeline management tool for site acquisition.
